nodes.name: use_expander.rs
nodes.summary: Config expander that processes use directives in risedev YAML configurations, resolving service references to their provider instances.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_rpc_client crate providing typed gRPC client wrappers for all RisingWave services.

nodes.name: parse.rs
nodes.summary: Example binary demonstrating SQL parsing using the RisingWave SQL parser, printing AST representations of SQL input.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the SQL parser fuzzing crate using cargo-fuzz for differential SQL parsing testing.

nodes.name: fuzz_parse_sql.rs
nodes.summary: Fuzzing target that feeds arbitrary byte sequences to the SQL parser to discover panics and edge cases.

nodes.name: sqlparser_bench.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark measuring SQL parsing throughput for common query patterns in RisingWave.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the SQL parser benchmark crate.

nodes.name: sqlparser.rs
nodes.summary: CLI binary for testing the SQL parser interactively, reading SQL from stdin or file and printing the parsed AST.

nodes.name: parser_test.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the SQL parser covering DDL, DML, and query statement parsing with expected AST output validation.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_backup crate implementing backup and restore operations for the Hummock storage engine.

nodes.name: metadata_models_v2.rs
nodes.summary: Tests for the v2 metadata backup model ensuring correct serialization and deserialization of backup metadata structures.

nodes.name: bench_block_cache.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for Hummock block cache operations measuring read amplification and cache hit performance.

nodes.name: bench_block_iter.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for Hummock SST block iterator seek and scan performance.

nodes.name: bench_compactor.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for Hummock compaction operations measuring SST compaction throughput and I/O patterns.

nodes.name: bench_compression.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks comparing compression algorithm performance (LZ4, Zstd, Snappy) for SST block compression.

nodes.name: bench_fs_operation.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for filesystem and object store operation latency and throughput.

nodes.name: bench_merge_iter.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for Hummock merge iterator performance across multiple SST levels.

nodes.name: bench_multi_builder.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for concurrent SST builder performance in Hummock's multi-builder infrastructure.

nodes.name: bench_row.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for row encoding and decoding performance using value and memcomparable formats in storage layer.

nodes.name: bench_table_watermarks.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for table watermark operations including watermark addition and vnode-level watermark queries.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_storage crate implementing the Hummock LSM-tree storage engine and state store abstraction.

nodes.name: clippy.toml
nodes.summary: Clippy lint configuration for the storage crate specifying allowed and denied lints for Hummock code quality.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_compactor crate implementing the standalone compactor node service.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_hummock_sdk crate providing shared types and utilities for Hummock clients and the storage engine.

nodes.name: bench_hummock_iter.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark for Hummock storage iterator performance including seek, scan, and range read operations.
